story.title: Our Story
story.p1: PP+ was founded with a passion for helping customers find the perfect paint for every project. We bring together all leading paint brands under one roof in Bangkok.
story.p2: Our team of paint experts has years of experience in the industry, providing professional consultation on color selection, paint types, and application techniques.
story.p3: We believe that the right paint can transform any space. That's why we're committed to offering genuine products, competitive prices, and expert advice to every customer.
